reviews.originalComment: Recomended hotel. Kalau ke Banda Aceh boleh nginap disini. Harga, lokasi, kebersihan, staf dan fasilitasnya semua mantap.
reviews.reviewComments: Recommended hotel. If you go to Banda Aceh, you can stay here. The price, location, cleanliness, staff, and facilities are all great.

reviews.reviewPositives: Breakfast was good, nice variety each day. The toilets on the 1st floor was immaculate. My room was tidy and quiet. Shower was good and the products in the room were good.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Room needs a bit of an update and the fixtures in the bathroom have rust. The bedroom would benefit from blackout curtains on the windows.

reviews.originalComment:
sudah kesekian kalinya menginap di amel, tidak pernah gagal. 
tempat dekat kemana mana. 
makanan selalu enak
reviews.reviewComments: This is the umpteenth time I've stayed at Amel, and it never disappoints. The place is close to everywhere. The food is always delicious.

reviews.reviewNegatives: Las sábanas y las toallas estaban bastante sucias. Pedimos otras almohadas y también estaban sucias. El hotel no está mal pera una noche de paso, pero da cosa dormir así.

reviews.originalComment: Fasilitas kamar lengkap, ada lokasi parkir yang luas,  staf hotel ramah selalu siap membantu, tidak jauh dari pusat kota,  banyak penjual makanan dan penyedia jasa laundry dekat hotel.
reviews.reviewComments: The room facilities are complete, there is ample parking space, the hotel staff is friendly and always ready to help, it is not far from the city center, and there are many food vendors and laundry service providers near the hotel.

reviews.reviewPositives:
Personnel très accueillant notamment le portier.
Petits restaurants à proximité
Nous avons pu aller au centre ville à pieds
reviews.reviewNegatives: Une des chambres sur les deux n était pas propre : salle de bain, draps

reviews.originalComment: Kamarnya luas, sayang tak ada jendela. Untuk mencari makan malam cukup jalan kaki, di sekitar hotel banyak penjual makanan. Lokasi tidak begitu jauh dari pelabuhan.
reviews.reviewComments: The room is spacious, but unfortunately there are no windows. To find dinner, it's just a short walk, as there are many food vendors around the hotel. The location is not very far from the port.

reviews.reviewPositives: Das Personal war sehr freundlich
reviews.reviewNegatives: Das Hotel ist in die Jahre gekommen.

reviews.originalComment:
Kami menginap di hotel amel awalny karena dekat dgn pelabuhan ule lhue..
Ternyata hotelny bersih, staf ramah dan makanan pun enak..
Bakalan balik lagi nginap di hotel amel kl ke banda..
😍😍😍
reviews.reviewComments: We stayed at Hotel Amel initially because it was close to the Ule Lhue port. It turned out that the hotel is clean, the staff is friendly, and the food is delicious. We will definitely return to stay at Hotel Amel when we go to Banda. 😍😍😍

reviews.reviewPositives:
Gute Lage. Der Hafen ist nur wenige Kilometer entfernt. 
Auch das Tsunami Museum ist fußläufig innerhalb von 20 Minuten zu erreichen.
Mehrere Supermärkte in der Nähe.
Sehr gute Klimaanlage
reviews.reviewNegatives: Das Bad hat seine besten Jahre hinter sich.

reviews.originalComment: Recomended hotel. Kalau ke Banda Aceh boleh nginap disini. Harga, lokasi, kebersihan, staf dan fasilitasnya semua mantap.

reviews.reviewNegatives: Room needs a bit of an update and the fixtures in the bathroom have rust. The bedroom would benefit from blackout curtains on the windows.

Gute Lage. Der Hafen ist nur wenige Kilometer entfernt.

reviews.reviewNegatives: Das Bad hat seine besten Jahre hinter sich.

reviews.originalComment:
Ini penginapan berkesan meski bukan hotel bintang 5. Semua memuaskan....
Nti klo ke banda saya akan terus pesan hotel ini...
reviews.reviewComments: This accommodation is impressive even though it is not a 5-star hotel. Everything is satisfactory... Next time I go to Banda, I will definitely book this hotel again...

reviews.reviewTitle: Prima voor 1 nacht maar zou er geen vakantie boeken.
reviews.reviewPositives: Het personeel is super vriendelijk.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Kamers waren erg karig ingericht, badkamer had schimmel en zag er echt niet fris uit.

reviews.originalComment: Kamar luas, harga bersahabat. Nyaman menginap di hotel ini. Next InsyaAllah bakalan menginap lagi disini.
reviews.reviewComments: Spacious room, friendly price. Comfortable stay at this hotel. Next, God willing, I will stay here again.

reviews.reviewPositives: Fijne douchekop en goede straal water van de douche. Aardige receptioniste, die ons vertelde waar we wat konden eten.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Als toerist uit Nederland ben ik dit niet gewend: vieze vlekken in het beddengoed, airco doet het amper en vieze badkamer. En ohja, we werden om 5 uur 's ochtends gewekt door de moskee...

reviews.originalComment: Hotelny bersih, lokasi dipusat kota. Resepsionis nya ramah n baik. Semoga selalu banyak yg menginap.
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is clean, located in the city center. The receptionist is friendly and nice. I hope there are always many guests staying.

reviews.reviewPositives: Goed hotel
reviews.reviewNegatives: Geen sfeer in het restaurant savonds

reviews.originalComment: Parkir luas, rekomendasi untuk keluarga yg bawak mobil, kamar bersih ada air panas/hangat
reviews.reviewComments: Spacious parking, recommended for families with cars, clean rooms with hot/warm water.

reviews.reviewPositives: De airco was top, op zich mooi hotel
reviews.reviewNegatives: Geen warm water in de douche, geen wifi op de kamer, matig ontbijt

reviews.reviewComments: Receipsionis nya ramah banget dan pelayanannya okey banget, dibantuin bawa tas juga dan inisiatif staffnya.

reviews.reviewPositives: Hotelnya nyaman dan bersih, serta dekat dengan pelabuhan ulee lhee (saat itu saya hendak ke Sabang)
reviews.reviewNegatives:
Kasur di kamar saya saat itu sepertinya sudah bisa diganti, karena terasa ada benda per dari besi di badan kita.
Dan jaringan wifi nya tidak stabil di dalam kamar (lantai bawah), apalagi saat malam hari tdk dapat tersambung.

reviews.originalComment: Hotelnya bagus, dan yang paling membuat nyaman itu karna stafnya baik pada ramah2 semua dari kakak2 receptionistnya, cleaning room service sampe satpamnya juga…
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is nice, and what makes it most comfortable is that the staff is friendly, from the receptionists to the cleaning service and even the security personnel…

reviews.reviewTitle: I have stayed here several times.
reviews.originalComment: Ini salah satu pilihan saya saat menginap dan kunjungan di Banda Aceh. Pelayanan stafnya bagus dan kebersihan kamar saat kita check in
reviews.reviewComments: This is one of my choices when staying and visiting Banda Aceh. The staff service is good and the cleanliness of the room when we checked in.

reviews.reviewPositives: friendly staff
reviews.reviewNegatives: location

reviews.originalComment: Perletakan hotel ini di tepi jalan utama .  Terdapat banyak restoran dan kedai makan di sepanjang jalan.
reviews.reviewComments: The location of this hotel is along the main road. There are many restaurants and eateries along the street.

reviews.reviewTitle: Thank you for a very nice stay
reviews.reviewPositives: The staff were lovely, they cleaned the room daily and changed the towels. Complimentary toiletries every day and water
reviews.reviewNegatives: WiFi was terrible in my room but worked in other areas

reviews.originalComment: Hotel utk keluarga ataupun perorangan, akses mudah, sekeliling hotel banyak jual makanan
reviews.reviewComments: Hotel for families or individuals, easy access, many food vendors around the hotel.

reviews.reviewTitle: It was an okay stay, considering the location to Ulele Port for those travelling to/fro from Sabang.
reviews.reviewPositives: The location.
reviews.reviewNegatives: The smell from the toilet. Nothing much they can do but it is definitely a minus point.

reviews.reviewComments: Hotel location is easy to access, close to the harbour. Culinary, supermarket n laundry are just walk distance.

reviews.reviewPositives: Na
reviews.reviewNegatives: Na

reviews.reviewComments: The room size was impressive, location was good. The facilities were satisfactory and meet the basic

reviews.reviewPositives: Big room
reviews.reviewNegatives: Not much restaurant around

reviews.reviewComments: Good service from hotel staff.. always helping guest .. keep it up.. high recommended for those to come Banda Aceh

reviews.reviewPositives: the location is strategic. few stalls of foods beside the hotel. also supermarkets.
reviews.reviewNegatives:
you can improve your facilities in the room such as iron, and iron board. and few more hangers i think :)
overall everything was good

reviews.reviewComments: Bangunan hotel cukup baru, fasilitas OK, ya..sesuai harga lah. Cukup puas. Overall rating 8/10.

reviews.reviewPositives: Breakfast is fair. Location is great forcatch ferry to pulua weh only 15 minutes away.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Too noisy from traffic outside. U won’t be able to sleep.

reviews.reviewComments: Bercuti bersama keluarga besar.. booking dalam 4 bilik.. 4 hari 3 malam.. sangat bersih.. ada breakfast sedap, bilik luas dan bersih.. setiap hari ada servis bersihkan bilik dan tukar cadar. Terbaik staf dan bagus.. layanan staf di receptionist pun jugak sangat bagus.. muka manis dan mesra.. toilet di ruangan kafeteria pun elok.. boleh repeat n recommended bagi orang yang bawa bersama keluarga, anak kecil.. iron dalam bilik tidak disediakan.. tapi available.. just mintak di receptionist.. mereka boleh provide

Bercuti bersama keluarga besar.. booking dalam 4 bilik.. 4 hari 3 malam.. sangat bersih.. ada breakfast sedap, bilik luas dan bersih.. setiap hari ada servis bersihkan bilik dan tukar cadar. Terbaik staf dan bagus.. layanan staf di receptionist pun jugak sangat bagus.. muka manis dan mesra.. toilet di ruangan kafeteria pun elok.. boleh repeat n recommended bagi orang yang bawa bersama keluarga, anak kecil.. iron dalam bilik tidak disediakan.. tapi available.. just mintak di receptionist.. mereka boleh provide

Bercuti bersama keluarga besar.. booking dalam 4 bilik.. 4 hari 3 malam.. sangat bersih.. ada breakfast sedap, bilik luas dan bersih.. setiap hari ada servis bersihkan bilik dan tukar cadar. Terbaik staf dan bagus.. layanan staf di receptionist pun jugak sangat bagus.. muka manis dan mesra.. toilet di ruangan kafeteria pun elok.. boleh repeat n recommended bagi orang yang bawa bersama keluarga, anak kecil.. iron dalam bilik tidak disediakan.. tapi available.. just mintak di receptionist.. mereka boleh provide
We travel in group of 5. Really recommended. The staff super friendly even we check in at 4.00a.m, the room is clean and comfortable.
The room is clean and cozy.  I left my luggage at the hotel during my stay at Sabang. When I came back for check in, the staff already put my luggage in my room.  Thanks for the great service.

reviews.reviewTitle: Booking a few rooms and very recommend
reviews.reviewComments: Bercuti bersama keluarga besar.. booking dalam 4 bilik.. 4 hari 3 malam.. sangat bersih.. ada breakfast sedap, bilik luas dan bersih.. setiap hari ada servis bersihkan bilik dan tukar cadar. Terbaik staf dan bagus.. layanan staf di receptionist pun jugak sangat bagus.. muka manis dan mesra.. toilet di ruangan kafeteria pun elok.. boleh repeat n recommended bagi orang yang bawa bersama keluarga, anak kecil
Saran saya, kamar dibersihkan jika customer minta saja, atau ditanyakan terlebih dahulu
Sangat senang dengan Hotel Amel, tempatnya nyaman dan karyawannya ramah ramah. Harganya murah tapi tidak murahan.
Staff nya bagus, bilik nya sangat luas, aircond sejuk, breakfast sedap & ade pilihan sesuai dgn harga.. lokasi strategik..
Clean  and  comfortable but need to upgrade facilities. Need to improve breakfast varities.
So far so good, but i think this is a old hotel because of the facilities rustied already.

We got a room on the busy road side. You could here all the motorbikes passing by and prayers from the mosque. We didn't get much sleep.
The sheets were with stains and hair on it. 
Breakfast very basic.

reviews.reviewTitle: Heran dengan rating nya yang tinggi
reviews.reviewComments: Heran dengan rating nya yang bisa begitu tinggi ! Tidak rekomend sama sekali ini hotel nya. Pas masuk uda da bau kagak enak , baru la cek ke kamar mandi nya ternyata banyak banget itu serangga sejenis lipan ato apa numpuk banyak kali. Minta ganti kamar langsung. Second kamar juga sprei nya berdebu , badan jdi gatal” ampun, air panas juga kagak ada. Last sarapan nya juga parah banget. Pengalaman yang sangat ngak enak hari pertama sampai di Aceh .
Besar n staff y baik
Bagus dan hemat
semuanya berada keadaan baik hotel bersih dan dekat dengan jualan makanan
Bilik cantik dan selesa
Hotel smell of sewer.
Large room, large bed, good breakfast, etc etc
Recommended to back again
Staff not friendly
Near to places of interest
Good place for all activities

Bagus dan Bersih
Pelayanan staff baik
Pelayanan dan kamar bagus
Very clean environment, room & staff very helpful... breakfast need variaties
The room is spacious and clean. The breakfast is good. Sure will stay here again
hotelnya nyaman dan bersih, receptionist nya ramah bangettt, recomended deh
istirahat nyaman dan tenang
Will repeat it again
Kekurangannya hanya pada sarapan yg sering kosong ...

In my review of this hotel, i found everything was in a good condition, location was great, there are numerous restaurant near the hotel, as well as a convenient store nearby. Except for the toilet, during my stay in different rooms, I noticed that the doorknobs on both toilet doors were not functioning
Kamar bersih dan luas, hanya saja blower di kamar mandi berisik.
Everything was superb
Overall good
Ok
Lokasi strategis,menu sarapan bisa dapat variasi buah segar
Close to ferry, clean, awesome breakfast

I highly recommend Amel Hotel if you are planning a visit to Banda Aceh. The facilities are top-notch, the breakfast is delicious, and the staff is incredibly helpful. Additionally, all of the amenities are practically new. I am already considering a stay at Amel Hotel during my next trip to the area.
There were cockroaches in the bathroom, and the sheets never got cleaned. The staff was not very helpful
ok
Thank you for a great experience

Location of the hotel is near city and port Ulee Lheeu so it's strategic. You can go to Baiturrahman Mosque only 10 minutes by car or motorcycle. 

The staff is really helpful and room is tidy and clean. For the price that we should pay this is excellent 👍🏽.
pernah dapet kamar yg seprai nya agak bau apek. but overall oke
very good
Nice hotel , good service ,  big room , everything perfect👍👍👍
Good joob
Simple hotel with basic necessities. Location good for transiting to Ulee Lhuee port

reviews.reviewTitle: Can be good but poor service
reviews.reviewComments:
Bilik hotel sangat kurang bersihnya. Tuala yang disediakan ada kesan darah. Kami telah menelefon receiptionist untuk penukaran tuala dan telah dijawab oleh receiptionist. Tetapi tuala nya tidak sampai langsung. Breakfast hanya average dan tiada banyak pilihan. Air pada waktu pagi tiada.

The room was not very clean. We recieved towels with bloodstain and requested a new one from receiptionist but the towel never came to our room. breakfast was average and there was not many options. There was no water supply in the morning.
Stayed one night, was ok, good bed decent sleep. But no wifi connect or hot water, seems like the description is a bit better than the reality once you check in.
Location, breakfast, cleanliness, and price are great. Really woth it!

Dirty and smelly rooms, dirty++ shits. Extremely noisy as well, there is no sound insulation at all, we barely slept
The breakfast is inexistant: the "buffet" consisted in an empty plate and an almost empty plate of cold fried noodles (and we went early)
The only bad accomodation experience we had in 3 weeks in Indonesia
Staf nya cepat tanggap & dpt mengakomodir keinginan pengunjung di Hotel AMEL
Hotelnya bagus , kamar bersih dan pelayanan baik. pokonya the best..
Someone smoking near my room , wifi very slow

reviews.originalComment: Tetap terus jaga kenyamanan dan kebersihan hotel makanan ny juga enak...
reviews.reviewComments: Keep maintaining comfort and cleanliness of the hotel, and the food is also delicious...

reviews.originalComment: Harga murah, sarapan enak ,dekat dgn ulele staf ramah, nyari makan dekat
reviews.reviewComments: Cheap prices, delicious breakfast, close to Ulele, friendly staff, easy to find food nearby.

reviews.originalComment: Hotel dengan harga terjangkau, bersih dan pelayanan yang baik
reviews.reviewComments: Affordable hotel, clean and good service.

reviews.originalComment:
Masya Allah ya hotel Amel,tiap kali mo mudik sll stay disini uda berkali2,,Makanan enak,Sahur di bangunin dgn alarm,,Anak ku 2th yg g bisa makan sahur di resto nya ketika sahur boleh lho di bawain tanpa kena charge ..semoga berkah buat hotel amel.
Wes pokok e jos tenan pelayanan nya..kids friendly ...
reviews.reviewComments: Masya Allah at Hotel Amel, every time I go home, I always stay here, already multiple times. The food is delicious, Sahur is woken up with an alarm. My 2-year-old child who can't eat Sahur in the restaurant can be brought in without being charged. I hope it’s a blessing for Hotel Amel. Basically, the service is really good... kids friendly...

reviews.originalComment: Hotel Bersih, Free Makanan dgn hrg hotel murah, pelayanan bagus, parkir luas, Pokoknya bagus lah, next dtg ke banda Aceh nginep di sini lg
reviews.reviewComments: Clean hotel, free food with cheap hotel price, good service, spacious parking, overall it's great. Next time I come to Banda Aceh, I will stay here again.

reviews.originalComment: Liburan akhir tahun 2023 - 2024 bersama keluarga kecil. Hotel bersih, kamar luas dan bersih, akses hotel mudah, pelayanan bagus, makanan lumayan enak. Terima kasih Staff hotel AMEL
reviews.reviewComments: End of year 2023 - 2024 holiday with the small family. Clean hotel, spacious and clean room, easy hotel access, good service, fairly tasty food. Thank you, AMEL hotel staff.

reviews.originalComment: Semua ok,hanya saja saya sedikit kecewa di karnakan sudah pesan dari 1 hari yang lalu,setiba di hotel jam 4 sore kamar belum siap di bersihkan
reviews.reviewComments: Everything is fine, but I am slightly disappointed because I made a reservation 1 day ago, and when I arrived at the hotel at 4 PM, the room was not yet cleaned.

reviews.originalComment:
Uda dua kali disini , masya Allah karyawan ramah, sarapan pagi juga enak , kids friendly banget kakak2 nya , ditawari dibuatin omlet pula buat anak sy yg 2 th...
Recomend buat yg mo nginep di banda aceh ,, bakal langganan di hotel ini selama di banda..uda murah pelayanan TOP. Tengkyuu ya agoda ud ngasi promo mulu
reviews.reviewComments: I stayed here twice, mashallah the staff are friendly, breakfast is also good, very kid-friendly, the staff even offered to make an omelet for my 2-year-old... Recommended for those who want to stay in Banda Aceh, I will definitely be a regular at this hotel while in Banda. It's affordable and the service is top-notch. Thank you Agoda for always providing promotions!

reviews.originalComment: Ni hotel recomend bgt ya gengs buat yg mo singgah jalan2 di banda aceh , deket kota, dimaa mana dkt , bersih ,ramah , dpt promo di agoda pulak...bawa anak kecil 2 th pun enjoy la ya...
reviews.reviewComments: I recommend a hotel that is great for those who want to stop by and explore Banda Aceh, close to the city, clean, friendly, and even has promotions on Agoda... even bringing a 2-year-old child is enjoyable!

reviews.originalComment: Hotel bersih, staf nya sgt  ramah, hrga lbh murah dr hotel lain tp tdk murahan, sdh termasuk sarapan dengan variasi menu yg lumayan untuk hrga nya , rekomended untuk bawa keluarga
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is clean, the staff is very friendly, the price is cheaper than other hotels but not cheap-quality, it includes breakfast with a decent menu variation for the price, recommended for bringing family.

reviews.originalComment: lokasi sangat dekat dengan pelabuhan ulele, jadi bisa sebagai tempat menginap menunggu antrian masuk ke pelabuhan uleele. Pelayan hotel ramah dan baik. Jam 5.30 sudah disiapkan sarapan nasi kotak karena cek out sebelum jam 6 pagi. recomended
reviews.reviewComments: The location is very close to Ulele port, so it can be a place to stay while waiting in line to enter Ulele port. The hotel staff is friendly and nice. Breakfast in takeaway boxes is prepared at 5:30 AM because check-out is before 6 AM. Recommended.

We booked family room with 3 single bed. The room was very spacious, yes there are 3 single bed, but you still have space to sleep if you cary sleeping bags. If you travel with family or young children, you’d definitely want to book this room.

When we got to our room, it was clean, they placed toothbrush, soap and towel in each of the beds. The bathroom is clean even though the floor is a bit slippy, the floor just need to be brushed by the staff. 

Breakfast was decent, you won’t see omelette corner, but you can ask to the staff and they will make it for you.

At night you could find food stalls just 3 minutes walks from the hotel. They are offering variety of local food and coffee.

For those who planned to go to Sabang, the hotel location just 10 minutes away to the harbour. You can order grab car to pick you up at the hotel and drop-off at the harbour. 

Overall we‘re happy during our stay.

reviews.reviewTitle: cheap, clean, and close to the port
reviews.originalComment:
hotel ini murah,bersih, dan dekat pelabuhan. kamarnya sangat luas, minus nya cuman keran2nya banyak yang karatan

hotel ini dekat pelabuhan, jadi gampang kalau mau nyebrang ke sabang. Dan bisa nitip mobil disini kalau nggak mau parkir di pelabuhan
reviews.reviewComments:
This hotel is cheap, clean, and near the port. The rooms are very spacious, the only downside is that many of the faucets are rusty.

This hotel is close to the port, so it's easy to cross over to Sabang. You can also leave your car here if you don't want to park at the port.

reviews.reviewTitle: The place is clean, peaceful, and comfortable.
reviews.originalComment: Selama penginapan gak berekspektasi tempatnya bagus, menurut aku kamarnya nyaman, airnya bersih dan air panasnya ngalir terus. utk sarapan gak terlalu banyak varian menu, tapi enak juga kok. bravo Amel Hotel.
reviews.reviewComments: During the stay, I didn't expect the place to be great, but I found the room comfortable, the water clean, and the hot water kept flowing. The breakfast didn't have too many menu options, but it was tasty. Bravo Amel Hotel.

reviews.originalComment: Tempatnya bersih, Hotelnya juga bagus, harganya terjangkau, dan deket dengan lapangan blang padang dan museum tsunami, dan tersedia sarapan pagi, sangat cocok untuk menginap disini setelah lelahnya beraktivitas.
reviews.reviewComments: The place is clean, the hotel is nice, the price is affordable, and it's close to Blang Padang field and the tsunami museum, and breakfast is provided, making it very suitable for staying here after a tiring day of activities.

Accueil, propreté, climatisation,eau chaude, service, situation géographique 
Très bonne adresse sur banda aceh
Bis zu dem Bad Armaturen, war alles sehr gut. Das Hotel liegt nah zur Ulee Lheu.
Bis zur den Bad Armaturen, war alles sehr gut.

Mostly  fine. The staff are friendly and the room is clean, but unfortunately there are large stains on sheets and towels. When we asked to switch rooms the new room again had dirty sheets. A refund was not possible. Eventually we were moved to a room with twin beds (instead of king) for which they had new sheets.
Zijn één nachtje verbleven in dit hotel. Ruime kamer, warme douche en goed werkende airconditioning. Wifi deed het ook goed genoeg voor een film via laptop. Ontbijt kan beter.
Keseluruhan amat memuaskan.
Semua bilik yang ditempah memuaskan, makanan dan kebersihan dan kakitangan hotel sangat terbaik.

TEMPAT MAKAN SENANG

Hotel sediakan parking kereta 
Ada breakfast dan banyak pilihan
Bilik yang sangat-sangat bersih
TIADA fridge di dalam bilik

Deposit Rp100ribu setiap bilik semasa check in dan dipulangkan waktu check out.
Hotel terletak berhadapan dengan jalan besar dan banyak kedai makan serta kedai runcit
Berdekatan dengan jeti untuk ke Pulau Sabang cuma 10 minit
Masjid, meseum, kapal apung lokasinya hanya 10 ke 15 minit dari hotel
Semestinya akan repeat lagi.
